Normal Condition: an image of a normal object with no visible defects.
Physical Damage: an image of an anomaly object with physical damage including scratches, cracks, or chips altering the object's surface.
Color Anomaly: an image of an anomaly object with color spots or discolorations differing from the object's standard appearance.
Structural Breakage: an image of an anomaly object with structural breakage including cracks, breaks, or deformation altering the object's original shape.
Foreign Material: an image of an anomaly object with foreign particles or extra material not part of the original object.
Melting/Burning: an image of an anomaly object with signs of melting or burning affecting the object's structure or appearance.
Missing Parts: an image of an anomaly object with missing parts or chunks altering the object's completeness.
Deformation: an image of an anomaly object with deformation including bending or misshaping altering the object's form.
Sticking Together: an image of an anomaly object with parts stuck together, altering the object's separation.
Other Defects: an image of an anomaly object with other unspecified defects affecting the object's quality.
